languages.text: Вокруг костра вы видите множество загадочных меток, начерченных сажей — и несколько лазбатарей, аккуратно разложенных вокруг.
Around the fire, you see many cryptic markings scrawled in soot, as well as a few neatly arranged power packs.
languages.original_text: Вокруг костра вы видите множество загадочных меток, начерченных сажей — и несколько лазбатарей, аккуратно разложенных вокруг.

traits.locale_text: Around the fire, you see many cryptic markings scrawled in soot, as well as a few neatly arranged las-batteries.
Around the fire, you see many cryptic markings scrawled in soot, as well as a few neatly arranged las-batteries.
Around the fire, you see many cryptic markings scrawled in soot, as well as a few neatly arranged las-batteries.

languages.text: 火の周りは、煤で書かれた謎めいた記号や、整然と並べられたラス電池がいくつか見られる。
languages.original_text: Around the fire, you see many cryptic markings scrawled in soot, as well as a few neatly arranged las-batteries.

traits.locale_text: 火の周りは、煤で書かれた謎めいた記号や、整然と並べられたラス電池がいくつか見られる。

languages.text: 火堆周围，你能看到许多用煤灰涂画的神秘符号，还有几个摆放整齐的能量包。
languages.original_text: Around the fire, you see many cryptic markings scrawled in soot, as well as a few neatly arranged power packs.

traits.locale_text: 火堆周围，你能看到许多用煤灰涂画的神秘符号，还有几个摆放整齐的能量包。

languages.text: Um das Feuer herum siehst du neben zahlreichen kryptischen Symbolen im Ruß einige ordentlich gestapelte Energiezellen.
languages.original_text: Around the fire, you see many cryptic markings scrawled in soot, as well as a few neatly arranged power packs.

traits.locale_text: Um das Feuer herum siehst du neben zahlreichen kryptischen Symbolen im Ruß einige ordentlich gestapelte Energiezellen.

languages.text: Autour du feu, vous voyez d'étranges marques tracées à la suie ainsi que des batteries bien alignées.
languages.original_text: Around the fire, you see many cryptic markings scrawled in soot, as well as a few neatly arranged power packs.

traits.locale_text: Autour du feu, vous voyez d'étranges marques tracées à la suie ainsi que des batteries bien alignées.

languages.text: En torno al fuego, ves numerosas marcas crípticas garabateadas con el hollín y unas cuantas baterías bien ordenadas.
languages.original_text: Around the fire, you see many cryptic markings scrawled in soot, as well as a few neatly arranged power packs.

traits.locale_text: En torno al fuego, ves numerosas marcas crípticas garabateadas con el hollín y unas cuantas baterías bien ordenadas.

languages.text: Ateşin etrafında, kurumla karalanmış birçok şifreli işaretin yanı sıra özenle dizilmiş birkaç güç paketi görüyorsun.
languages.original_text: Around the fire, you see many cryptic markings scrawled in soot, as well as a few neatly arranged power packs.

traits.locale_text: Ateşin etrafında, kurumla karalanmış birçok şifreli işaretin yanı sıra özenle dizilmiş birkaç güç paketi görüyorsun.
